title: Connection layout for commemorating deceased persons
abstract: The subject of the invention is a connection layout for commemorating deceased persons, which includes at least one item of commemoration (2) placed onto a headstone (9). It is characterized in that the item of commemoration (2) is mounted onto the headstone (9) at a visible location, and it is assigned a unique identifier (3), and the unique identifier (3) is associated with a data sheet (4), and the data sheet (4) is stored in a database (5) kept on a server (6).
claims: Claims 1. A connection layout for commemorating deceased persons, comprising at least one item of commemoration (2) placed onto a headstone (9), characterized in that it further comprises a unique identifier (3), a data sheet (4) and a database (5); the item of commemoration (2) is mounted onto the headstone (9) at a visible location, and it is assigned the unique identifier (3), and the unique identifier (3) is associated with the data sheet (4), and the data sheet (4) is stored in the database (5), the database (5) is kept on a server (6). 2. The connection layout according to claim 1, characterized in that the unique identifier (3) is an NFC chip and/or a written link and/or a QR code. 3. The connection layout according to claim 1 or 2, characterized in that a reader device (1) capable of reading the unique identifier (3) is associated with the identifier. 4. The connection layout according to claim 3, characterized in that the reader device (1) is a smartwatch and/or smartphone and/or tablet, and the reader device (1) is in wireless connection (8) with the unique identifier (3) that is capable of transmitting electronic, photo and/or electromagnetic signal packages. 5. The connection layout according to claim 4, characterized in that, when an NFC chip is used as a unique identifier (3), the wireless connection (8) is an NFC connection. 6. Any of the connection layouts according to claims 1 to 5, characterized in that it includes a client device (7) that is capable of editing the data sheet (4) stored in the database (5) and is in a wired or wireless connection (8) with the server (6) that is capable of transmitting electronic, photo and/or electromagnetic signal packages. 7. The connection layout according to claim 6, characterized in that a smartphone and/or tablet and/or laptop and/or desktop computer is used as client device (7). 8. Any of the connection layouts according to claims 1 to 7, characterized in that the diameter of the item of commemoration (2) is 50 to 100 mm, suitably approximately 70 mm, and it is made of porcelain, and it is glued onto the headstone (9). 9. Any of the connection layouts according to claims 1 to 8, characterized in that the item of commemoration (2) is assigned to a specific headstone (9); and the number of items of commemoration (2) is equal to the number of headstones (9).
